title_en: Common Business Deductions — Self-Employed in Quebec (2026)
description_en: Allowable business expenses reduce your net income for tax purposes. Expenses must be incurred to earn business income and be reasonable in the circumstances.

categories.description_en: If you work from home, you can deduct a proportional share of household expenses
categories.calculation_en: Calculate the percentage of your home used exclusively for work (e.g., home office square footage / total home square footage)

categories.description_en: You can deduct the business-use portion of vehicle expenses
categories.note_en: Must keep a mileage logbook to support business vs personal use

deductible_expenses_en: Books and subscriptions related to your business

categories.description_en: Capital assets are depreciated over time using Capital Cost Allowance (CCA) classes

non_deductible_en: Personal clothing (unless a uniform or protective gear)
Personal meals (50% rule applies to business meals)
Club memberships (golf, fitness) unless core to business
